texto: The drawings in 'Portal' were actually me scribbling that stuff... I had a funny moment when I realized that someone gotten 'The cake is a lie' tattooed on themselves. It was really interesting to see my handwriting tattooed on another human being. That... that's odd.
explicacao: Citação de Kim Swift sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “The drawings in 'Portal' were actually me scribbling that stuff... I had a funny moment when I re…” articula tempo, lie, moment em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como moment e me.
